description: This repository contains my final project for the RevoU Software Engineering Fundamental Course. The project is a landing page for a fictional educational institution, designed to demonstrate the core principles of web development.

name: predictive-maintenance-weibull-machine-learning
description: This repository explores the integration of Machine Learning with the Weibull Distribution to improve the accuracy of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) estimations. By treating the Weibull scale parameter ( λ ) as a dynamic target for regression, these projects bridge the gap between statistical reliability analysis and modern data-driven maintenance.

name: Fuzzy-System-for-Determining-Project-Priorities
description: This project aims to develop a project prioritization system using fuzzy logic, which can help companies select and prioritize projects more effectively amidst information uncertainty. In a competitive business environment, sound decisions are critical to a company's success.
